base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of piranha_pokey_plants — a character from 1990 super mario world. Piranha Plant + Pokey + Muncher black plant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Piranha Plant + Pokey + Muncher black plant
